questions.question: What is the two-layer mechanism behind speculative decoding?
options: Two target models alternate per token
An embedding model and a synthesizer
A retrieval cache and a reranker
A draft model proposes k candidate tokens; the target model verifies them in a single pass
questions.question_zh: speculative decoding 背后的两层机制是什么?
options_zh: 两个 target 模型按 token 交替
一个 embedding 模型加一个合成器
一个检索缓存加一个 reranker
draft 模型提议 k 个候选 token,target 模型用一次前向一并验证

questions.question: What does EAGLE-3 do that ngram drafts do not?
options: It trains draft heads on the target model's hidden states for higher acceptance rates
questions.question_zh: EAGLE-3 相比 ngram draft 多做了什么?
options_zh: 替代了 target 模型
在 target 模型的 hidden state 上训练 draft head,以获得更高的接受率
完全避免 tokenization
只在 CPU 上跑

questions.question: Why is p99 tail latency reported across batch sizes 1, 8, and 32?
options: Steady-state tokens-per-second can hide that the verify pass on rejection is more expensive than vanilla decoding
vLLM cannot serve batch sizes below 8
p99 only matters at batch size 32
Tail latency is independent of batch size
questions.question_zh: 为什么 p99 尾延迟要在 batch size 1、8、32 上分别报告?
options_zh: 稳态的 tokens-per-second 会掩盖一个事实: 拒绝时的 verify pass 比普通解码更贵
vLLM 不能服务 batch size 小于 8
p99 只在 batch size 32 时才重要
尾延迟与 batch size 无关

questions.question: Why does acceptance rate drift when the traffic distribution shifts?
options: Draft alignment depends on the input distribution: ShareGPT, code, and domain data exercise different patterns
The OS scheduler reshuffles GPU memory
questions.question_zh: 为什么流量分布变化时接受率会漂移?
options_zh: vLLM 每小时轮换模型
Draft 对齐取决于输入分布: ShareGPT、代码和领域数据触发的模式各不相同
操作系统调度器重新打乱 GPU 显存
运行时量化方式发生变化

questions.question: Which Kubernetes HPA signal does the deployment scale on?
questions.question_zh: Kubernetes HPA 用哪个信号来扩缩部署?
options_zh: Cluster autoscaler 节点
CPU 利用率
磁盘 IOPS
推理请求的 queue-wait 时间

questions.question: What does P-EAGLE add over serial EAGLE-3?
options: Parallel speculation across a tree of draft branches verified in one target pass
questions.question_zh: P-EAGLE 相对于串行 EAGLE-3 增加了什么?
options_zh: 把权重量化为 FP4
去掉 target 模型
在 draft 分支树上做并行 speculation,target 一次前向验证
自动化数据筛选

questions.question: Which throughput target does the rubric demand against the non-speculative baseline?
options: At least 2.5x at matched quality on two models
questions.question_zh: 评分标准对非 speculative baseline 要求达到的吞吐目标是?
options_zh: 在两种模型上,质量持平的前提下至少 2.5 倍
任何高于 baseline 的提升
约 1.1 倍且质量持平
在任意质量下精确 10 倍
